tagline: Unified affiliate, influencer, and referral program management

pricingIntel.summary: Pricing not publicly listed. Likely scales with program size and GMV
details: No visible pricing on the website
Covers Shopify, Meta Ads, and TikTok Shop in one platform
Includes creator discovery, automated payouts, UGC management, gifting/seeding
costDrivers: Number of active creators/affiliates in your program
GMV driven through the platform (may take a percentage)
Channel breadth. Shopify + Meta + TikTok vs. single channel

benefits.label: Affiliate and influencer-driven revenue
benefits.description: Creators promote your brand through cobranded landing pages, affiliate links, and social content. Case studies show affiliates driving 5-10% of total brand revenue.

affiliateRevenuePct.label: % of total revenue driven by affiliate/influencer channel
affiliateRevenuePct.source: Superfiliate case studies: '5-10% of total revenue', Epic Gardening 58% Q3-Q4 growth

commissionRate.label: Average creator commission rate
commissionRate.source: industry avg (affiliate commissions typically 10-20% of sale)

benefits.label: Cobranded landing page conversion lift
benefits.description: Personalized landing pages per creator convert at higher rates than generic product pages because the visitor already trusts the creator who sent them.

affiliateRevenuePct.label: % of revenue through affiliate channel (same as above)

cobrandedLift.label: Additional conversion lift from cobranded landing pages vs. standard affiliate links
cobrandedLift.source: dtcmvp estimate (Graza case study: 3x ROAS on cobranded LPs, we model 20% incremental lift)

benefits.label: Program management time savings
benefits.description: Automated creator discovery, outreach via IG DMs, payout processing, and reporting replace manual spreadsheet management.

weeklyHoursSaved.label: Hours saved per week from automation
weeklyHoursSaved.source: Superfiliate case study: Lineage 'saved 12h+ per week via automated workflows', discounted to 10

hourlyOpsCost.label: Fully loaded hourly cost of marketing/ops labor
hourlyOpsCost.source: dtcmvp estimate ($25-40/hr for DTC marketing ops)

sources: Superfiliate claims: 'drives anywhere from 5-10% of our total revenue'
Graza: 3x ROAS using cobranded landing pages
Viva Raw: 32% increase in LTV, $2M+ GMV
Omnilux: 22% of revenue from new customers, 50k+ cobranded LP visits

narrative.headline: Superfiliate could drive {revenueTotal}/yr in affiliate revenue and save {timeSavingsTotal}/yr in ops time for {brandName}.

byDepartment.Influencer / Affiliate: For {contactName} on the influencer/affiliate side: Superfiliate consolidates your creator program into one platform. The {revenueTotal}/yr in affiliate revenue comes from cobranded landing pages and creator-driven sales. The {timeSavingsTotal}/yr in time savings replaces the manual work of managing payouts, outreach, and reporting across spreadsheets.
byDepartment.Marketing / Growth: For {contactName} and the marketing team: affiliate and influencer sales are your lowest-CAC acquisition channel. Superfiliate drives {revenueTotal}/yr through creator partnerships at a fraction of the cost of paid media. The cobranded landing pages alone can deliver 3x ROAS based on case study data.
byDepartment.Performance / Paid: For {contactName} on the paid side: affiliate revenue is the performance channel that does not require ad spend. {revenueTotal}/yr from Superfiliate at a 15% commission rate gives {brandName} a blended CAC that brings down your overall acquisition cost.
byDepartment.Founder & CEO: For {contactName}: Superfiliate adds {totalValue}/yr to {brandName} through affiliate/influencer revenue ({revenueTotal}/yr) and ops time savings ({timeSavingsTotal}/yr). At your {targetMultiple} target, the ceiling is {maxMonthly}/mo.
byDepartment.Other: Superfiliate adds {totalValue}/yr to {brandName} by consolidating affiliate, influencer, and referral programs into one platform with automated payouts and cobranded landing pages.

byCategory.Apparel & Fashion: Apparel brands are the strongest category for affiliate and influencer programs. Fashion creators drive high-intent traffic through outfit content, and cobranded landing pages convert well because the styling context is built in for {brandName}.
byCategory.Beauty & Cosmetics: Beauty brands see strong creator-driven revenue because tutorials, reviews, and before/after content are the foundation of beauty purchasing decisions. {brandName}'s affiliate channel should be one of the top revenue drivers.
byCategory.Health & Wellness: Health and wellness brands benefit from trusted creator endorsements. Supplement and fitness brands in particular see high conversion from influencer content because buyers want social proof before committing.
byCategory.Other: Affiliate and influencer performance depends on creator fit and product category. Brands with visual, shareable products see the strongest results.

notes: Superfiliate is strongest for brands with an existing creator community or influencer relationships. Brands with no creator program today should consider the ramp-up time. the SWAG assumes a steady-state program, not month-one results.
